name: Speedroid Rubberband Plane
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＳＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピードロイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>５</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファイブ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>６</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シックス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>プレーン
desc: If a monster is Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except WIND monsters. You can only use this effect of "Speedroid Rubberband Plane" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 600 ATK until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster is Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except WIND monsters. You can only use this effect of "Speedroid Rubberband Plane" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 600 ATK until the end of this turn.
eff: If a monster is Special Summoned to your field (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except WIND monsters. You can only use this effect of "Speedroid Rubberband Plane" once per turn. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 600 ATK until the end of this turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Attribute specific monsters
